displayUrls.description: The list of local and public URLs to send display notifications to when using Terminal API.

encryptionKey.description: The key you share with Adyen to secure local communications when using Terminal API.

eventUrls.description: The list of local and public URLs to send event notifications to when using Terminal API.

nexoEventUrls.description: One or more URLs to send event messages to when using Terminal API.

notification.description: Configures sending event notifications by pressing a button on a terminal, for example used for pay-at-table.
